summary: Iteration 20: Complete testing of all requested features. Backend 100% (29/29 tests passed). Frontend UI verified working. BUG FIX CONFIRMED: POST /api/painel-vagas/duplicar-periodo now correctly creates empty periods when periodo_origem is not provided. The empty period appears in the dropdown and shows 0 turmas as expected.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions being -1. Recharts complaining about container size. Non-blocking but generates console noise.

tests: GET /api/painel-vagas/periodos - Lists all periods including empty ones
GET /api/painel-vagas/dashboard - Returns resumo, por_curso, por_turno, alertas
POST /api/painel-vagas/duplicar-periodo (BUG FIX) - Creates empty period without origem
GET /api/apoio/meu-dia - Returns tarefas, lembretes, estatisticas, saudacao
GET /api/contatos/tipos - Returns list of contact types
POST /api/auth/login - Valid credentials return token and usuario

bug_fix_verified.title: Criar período vazio deve funcionar e aparecer na lista
bug_fix_verified.previous_behavior: Required periodo_origem, couldn't create empty period
bug_fix_verified.new_behavior: When periodo_origem is null/empty, creates entry in periodos_letivos collection. Returns: {'message': 'Período X criado (vazio). Adicione turmas manualmente.', 'turmas_criadas': 0}
verification: Frontend test: Empty period 2027.TEST_4e2899 created via UI
Frontend test: Period appears in dropdown immediately
Frontend test: Dashboard shows 0 turmas, 0 vagas for empty period

frontend_ui_tests.login: PASS - Form fills, submits, redirects to /admin
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard: PASS - Shows 416 Solicitações, 0 Pendências, 50 Reembolsos, 95.2% Taxa Conversão
frontend_ui_tests.painel_vagas: PASS - Shows 41 Turmas, 1710 Total Vagas, dashboard cards, ocupação por curso
frontend_ui_tests.criar_periodo_vazio: PASS - Modal opens, unchecking duplicar shows message, creates empty period, toast confirms
frontend_ui_tests.meu_dia: PASS - Saudação shows, tarefas list, lembretes sidebar, criar tarefa modal works
frontend_ui_tests.reembolsos: PASS - Dashboard cards (20/5/0/25/0/50), list with 50 items, filters work
frontend_ui_tests.pendencias: PASS - Central de Pendências, status cards, list with 3 items

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for periods and tasks. Empty periods created: 2027.TEST_*, TEST_DUP_*. Tasks created: TEST_Tarefa_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20: All requested features tested and working. BUG FIX for 'criar período vazio' is CONFIRMED FIXED. The POST /api/painel-vagas/duplicar-periodo endpoint now accepts empty periodo_origem and creates a period in periodos_letivos collection. Frontend modal correctly shows 'Criar Vazio' option and the period appears in dropdown. Backend has 100% pass rate. All modules (Painel Vagas, Meu Dia, Reembolsos, Pendências, Contatos, Auth) working correctly.
